title: morisonia incana
intro: Morisonia incana, also known as the "hairy milkwort" or "morisonia", is a species of flowering plant in the family Haloragaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, although further research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, Morisonia incana is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
